heading: Today
text: Any early showers ending.  Low clouds and patches of fog giving way to increasing sunshine.  Continued mild.  Highs in the 40s to low 50s.  Winds becoming west to southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming mostly clear, then some clouds late from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north.  Lows in the upper 20s to mid 30s.  Winds southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph this evening, decreasing overnight.

heading: Monday
text: Partly sunny from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, and mostly sunny south.  Quite mild.  Highs in the 50s to near 60 north, 60 to 65 south.  Winds southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph.
